response: Luigi Cherubini was the composer who wrote his music most recently. He composed "Ali Baba" in 1833, which was his last opera, and his work "Overture in G major" was written in early 1815. Michael Tippett, on the other hand, composed "A Child of Our Time" between 1939 and 1941, which was first performed in 1944. Thus, Luigi Cherubini's last major composition was "Ali Baba" in 1833, making him the composer who wrote his music most recently.
